texts.orig: 1 DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION
texts.text: 1 DEFINITIONS AND INTERPRETATION

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1.1 Whenever used in this Agreement the following terms shall have the following meanings:
texts.text: 1.1 Whenever used in this Agreement the following terms shall have the following meanings:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: " Affiliate "  means in relation to a Party, any Subsidiary or Subsidiary Undertaking of the Party, any Holding Company of the Party and any Subsidiary or Subsidiary Undertaking of such Holding Company and " member of the Group " shall be construed accordingly;
texts.text: " Affiliate "  means in relation to a Party, any Subsidiary or Subsidiary Undertaking of the Party, any Holding Company of the Party and any Subsidiary or Subsidiary Undertaking of such Holding Company and " member of the Group " shall be construed accordingly;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For the purpose of this definition "Holding Company", "Subsidiary" and Subsidiary Undertaking" shall have the meanings given to them in the Companies Act 2006;
texts.text: For the purpose of this definition "Holding Company", "Subsidiary" and Subsidiary Undertaking" shall have the meanings given to them in the Companies Act 2006;

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ' Business ' means the proprietary technology, design and intellectual property rights and the research, development plans, processes and commercial relationships developed by Cool Planet in relation to the development and commercialisation of its membrane based carbon capture, utilisation, storage and disposal business;
texts.text: ' Business ' means the proprietary technology, design and intellectual property rights and the research, development plans, processes and commercial relationships developed by Cool Planet in relation to the development and commercialisation of its membrane based carbon capture, utilisation, storage and disposal business;

texts.text: " Disclosed Information " means any information communicated to or obtained by the Receiving Party or its Representatives, directly or indirectly from the Disclosing Party (either through itself or its Affiliates and its and their Representatives) in connection with the Permitted Purpose and/or the Business whether in written, electronic or any other form or medium in which such information may be kept, or in the course of any oral or written communications, including technical designs, patents, innovations, industrial and commercial processes, models, interpretations and forecasts, marketing arrangements, developments plans and other technical, financial, contractual and commercial data and

texts.text: " Permitted Purpose " means: the discussion and evaluation of potential carbon capture solutions for Veolia Process Group using Cool Planet's membrane technology on a standalone basis or including the Cool Planet carbon capture Business;

texts.text: " Secondary Data " means material derived or generated from the inspection or evaluation of the Disclosed Information, including notes, summaries, interpolations or synthesis.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2 OBLIGATION OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND USE OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
texts.text: 2 OBLIGATION OF CONFIDENTIALITY AND USE OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.1  In consideration of the Disclosing Party making available Disclosed Information to the Receiving Party, the Receiving Party undertakes:
texts.text: 2.1  In consideration of the Disclosing Party making available Disclosed Information to the Receiving Party, the Receiving Party undertakes:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.1.1 to hold the Confidential Information in the strictest confidence and not to disclose, trade or otherwise divulge the Confidential Information to any Person without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party, except as permitted by this Clause 2; and
texts.text: 2.1.1 to hold the Confidential Information in the strictest confidence and not to disclose, trade or otherwise divulge the Confidential Information to any Person without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party, except as permitted by this Clause 2; and

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.1.2 to use the Confidential Information only for the Permitted Purpose.
texts.text: 2.1.2 to use the Confidential Information only for the Permitted Purpose.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.2  The Receiving Party may disclose the Confidential Information without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party only to the extent that immediately prior to such disclosure the Confidential Information:
texts.text: 2.2  The Receiving Party may disclose the Confidential Information without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party only to the extent that immediately prior to such disclosure the Confidential Information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.2.1 is already lawfully known to the Receiving Party or its Affiliates under no applicable obligations of confidentiality or restrictions on use;
texts.text: 2.2.1 is already lawfully known to the Receiving Party or its Affiliates under no applicable obligations of confidentiality or restrictions on use;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.2.2 is in the public domain other than through the act or omission of the Receiving Party or of any other Person to whom Confidential Information is disclosed pursuant to this Agreement;
texts.text: 2.2.2 is in the public domain other than through the act or omission of the Receiving Party or of any other Person to whom Confidential Information is disclosed pursuant to this Agreement;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.2.3 is available to the Receiving Party or its Affiliates having become so available through any third party that expressly represents that it has the right to disclose such information at the time that it is acquired by the Receiving Party or its Affiliates;
texts.text: 2.2.3 is available to the Receiving Party or its Affiliates having become so available through any third party that expressly represents that it has the right to disclose such information at the time that it is acquired by the Receiving Party or its Affiliates;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.2.4 is required to be disclosed by law or by any government, statutory or regulatory body (provided that the Receiving Party informs the receiving third party of the confidential nature of such Confidential Information and makes all reasonable efforts to give prompt written notice to the Disclosing Party prior to such disclosure of the request made by such receiving third party and the extent of the intended disclosure); or
texts.text: 2.2.4 is required to be disclosed by law or by any government, statutory or regulatory body (provided that the Receiving Party informs the receiving third party of the confidential nature of such Confidential Information and makes all reasonable efforts to give prompt written notice to the Disclosing Party prior to such disclosure of the request made by such receiving third party and the extent of the intended disclosure); or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.2.5 is required to be disclosed by the Receiving Party or any of its Affiliates to comply with the rules and regulations of any recognised stock exchange upon which the Receiving Party's or its Affiliates' stock is quoted or the Securities and Exchange commission of the United States of America (provided that the Receiving Party informs the receiving third party of the confidential nature of such Confidential Information and makes all reasonable efforts to give prompt written notice to the Disclosing Party prior to such disclosure of the request made by such receiving third party and the extent of the intended disclosure).
texts.text: 2.2.5 is required to be disclosed by the Receiving Party or any of its Affiliates to comply with the rules and regulations of any recognised stock exchange upon which the Receiving Party's or its Affiliates' stock is quoted or the Securities and Exchange commission of the United States of America (provided that the Receiving Party informs the receiving third party of the confidential nature of such Confidential Information and makes all reasonable efforts to give prompt written notice to the Disclosing Party prior to such disclosure of the request made by such receiving third party and the extent of the intended disclosure).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.3  The Receiving Party may disclose the Confidential Information, without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party, to the following Persons for the Permitted Purpose:
texts.text: 2.3  The Receiving Party may disclose the Confidential Information, without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party, to the following Persons for the Permitted Purpose:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.3.1 employees, directors and officers of the Receiving Party;
texts.text: 2.3.1 employees, directors and officers of the Receiving Party;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.3.2 its Affiliates and employees, directors and officers of such Affiliates; 2.3.3
texts.text: 2.3.2 its Affiliates and employees, directors and officers of such Affiliates; 2.3.3

texts.label: text
texts.orig: contract personnel of the Receiving Party or its Affiliates; and
texts.text: contract personnel of the Receiving Party or its Affiliates; and

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.3.4 any insurer, insurance broker, professional adviser, consultant or agent retained by the Receiving Party or its Affiliates; and
texts.text: 2.3.4 any insurer, insurance broker, professional adviser, consultant or agent retained by the Receiving Party or its Affiliates; and

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.3.5 any bank, financial institution, fund or funding entity which the Receiving Party proposes or intends to involve in the financing of the Permitted Purpose, and their professional advisers.
texts.text: 2.3.5 any bank, financial institution, fund or funding entity which the Receiving Party proposes or intends to involve in the financing of the Permitted Purpose, and their professional advisers.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.4  Prior to the disclosure of any Confidential Information to any Person under the provisions of Clause 2.3, the Receiving Party shall procure that the proposed recipient of such Confidential Information:
texts.text: 2.4  Prior to the disclosure of any Confidential Information to any Person under the provisions of Clause 2.3, the Receiving Party shall procure that the proposed recipient of such Confidential Information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.4.1 is made aware of the terms of this Agreement; and
texts.text: 2.4.1 is made aware of the terms of this Agreement; and

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.4.2 if disclosure is made under the provisions of Clauses 2.3.3, 2.3.4, or 2.3.5, is bound to the Receiving Party to maintain the confidentiality of such Confidential Information on terms no less onerous than those set out in this Agreement.
texts.text: 2.4.2 if disclosure is made under the provisions of Clauses 2.3.3, 2.3.4, or 2.3.5, is bound to the Receiving Party to maintain the confidentiality of such Confidential Information on terms no less onerous than those set out in this Agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.5 The Receiving Party shall be liable to the Disclosing Party for any loss or damage suffered by the Disclosing Party arising out of the disclosure of Confidential Information by any Person to whom it has been disclosed directly or indirectly by the Receiving Party to the same extent as if the Confidential Information had been disclosed by the Receiving Party.
texts.text: 2.5 The Receiving Party shall be liable to the Disclosing Party for any loss or damage suffered by the Disclosing Party arising out of the disclosure of Confidential Information by any Person to whom it has been disclosed directly or indirectly by the Receiving Party to the same extent as if the Confidential Information had been disclosed by the Receiving Party.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3 LIABILITY
texts.text: 3 LIABILITY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.1 The Disclosing Party represents and warrants to the Receiving Party that it has the right and authority to disclose the Disclosed Information to the Receiving Party.
texts.text: 3.1 The Disclosing Party represents and warrants to the Receiving Party that it has the right and authority to disclose the Disclosed Information to the Receiving Party.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.2 The Disclosing Party makes no representations or warranties, express or implied, regarding the quality, completeness or accuracy of the Disclosed Information.
texts.text: 3.2 The Disclosing Party makes no representations or warranties, express or implied, regarding the quality, completeness or accuracy of the Disclosed Information.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.3 Other than as a result of a breach of the representation and warranty in Clause 3.1, the Disclosing Party has no liability with respect to the use of or reliance upon the Confidential Information by the Receiving Party.
texts.text: 3.3 Other than as a result of a breach of the representation and warranty in Clause 3.1, the Disclosing Party has no liability with respect to the use of or reliance upon the Confidential Information by the Receiving Party.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.4 The Parties agree and acknowledge that monetary damages may not be a sufficient remedy for any actual or threatened breach of this Agreement and that, in addition to all other remedies, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to seek the remedy of injunction, specific performance and any other equitable relief for any threatened or actual breach of the provisions of this Agreement.
texts.text: 3.4 The Parties agree and acknowledge that monetary damages may not be a sufficient remedy for any actual or threatened breach of this Agreement and that, in addition to all other remedies, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to seek the remedy of injunction, specific performance and any other equitable relief for any threatened or actual breach of the provisions of this Agreement.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4 STORAGE, RETURN AND RETENTION OF INFORMATION
texts.text: 4 STORAGE, RETURN AND RETENTION OF INFORMATION

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.1 The Receiving Party shall exercise all due care in ensuring the proper and secure storage of the Confidential Information.
texts.text: 4.1 The Receiving Party shall exercise all due care in ensuring the proper and secure storage of the Confidential Information.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.2 The Disclosed Information shall remain the property of the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party shall acquire no proprietary interest in, or right to, the Disclosed Information.
texts.text: 4.2 The Disclosed Information shall remain the property of the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party shall acquire no proprietary interest in, or right to, the Disclosed Information.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.3 As soon as practicable after a demand in writing from the Disclosing Party all original copies of the Disclosed Information shall be retrieved and returned by the Receiving Party to the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party shall, on request, notify the Disclosing Party in writing that it has:
texts.text: 4.3 As soon as practicable after a demand in writing from the Disclosing Party all original copies of the Disclosed Information shall be retrieved and returned by the Receiving Party to the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party shall, on request, notify the Disclosing Party in writing that it has:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.3.1 destroyed all other copies of the Disclosed Information in its possession;
texts.text: 4.3.1 destroyed all other copies of the Disclosed Information in its possession;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.3.2 taken all reasonably practicable steps to permanently erase all Disclosed Information from computer media; and
texts.text: 4.3.2 taken all reasonably practicable steps to permanently erase all Disclosed Information from computer media; and

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.3.3 procured that all persons to whom the Receiving Party has disclosed any Disclosed Information comply with this Clause 4.
texts.text: 4.3.3 procured that all persons to whom the Receiving Party has disclosed any Disclosed Information comply with this Clause 4.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.4 Clause 4.3 shall not apply to:
texts.text: 4.4 Clause 4.3 shall not apply to:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.4.1 Disclosed Information that is required to be retained by the Receiving Party by law, including by stock exchange regulations or by governmental order, decree, regulation or rule;
texts.text: 4.4.1 Disclosed Information that is required to be retained by the Receiving Party by law, including by stock exchange regulations or by governmental order, decree, regulation or rule;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.4.2 Disclosed Information which has been automatically backed-up on the computer systems of the Receiving Party or its Representatives. To the extent that such computer back-up procedures create copies of the Disclosed Information, the Receiving Party and/or its Representatives, as appropriate, may retain such
texts.text: 4.4.2 Disclosed Information which has been automatically backed-up on the computer systems of the Receiving Party or its Representatives. To the extent that such computer back-up procedures create copies of the Disclosed Information, the Receiving Party and/or its Representatives, as appropriate, may retain such

texts.label: text
texts.orig: copies for the period they normally archive backed-up computer records;
texts.text: copies for the period they normally archive backed-up computer records;

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.4.3 any Secondary Data, including corporate documents of the Receiving Party which contain data derived from the Disclosed Information which is contained or reflected in material presented to its or any of its Affiliates' executive board(s) (or the equivalent thereof).
texts.text: 4.4.3 any Secondary Data, including corporate documents of the Receiving Party which contain data derived from the Disclosed Information which is contained or reflected in material presented to its or any of its Affiliates' executive board(s) (or the equivalent thereof).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.5 If any Affiliate of the Receiving Party to whom Confidential Information has been disclosed as provided for herein ceases to be an Affiliate, the Receiving Party undertakes to retrieve to itself any Confidential Information, materials and records in whatsoever media related to Confidential Information so disclosed, prior to any such Affiliate ceasing to be such and to cause such Affiliate to destroy all records and copies in whatsoever media of the disclosed Confidential Information.
texts.text: 4.5 If any Affiliate of the Receiving Party to whom Confidential Information has been disclosed as provided for herein ceases to be an Affiliate, the Receiving Party undertakes to retrieve to itself any Confidential Information, materials and records in whatsoever media related to Confidential Information so disclosed, prior to any such Affiliate ceasing to be such and to cause such Affiliate to destroy all records and copies in whatsoever media of the disclosed Confidential Information.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.6 The return or destruction of Confidential Information and the ability to retain certain data pursuant to Clause 4.4 shall not release the Receiving Party from any of its obligations under this Agreement.
texts.text: 4.6 The return or destruction of Confidential Information and the ability to retain certain data pursuant to Clause 4.4 shall not release the Receiving Party from any of its obligations under this Agreement.

texts.text: 5 TERMINATION

texts.text: 5.1 This Agreement shall terminate on the earlier of:

texts.text: 5.1.1 five years from the date of this Agreement;

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: 5.1.2 the Parties entering into an agreement which contains provisions covering the confidentiality of the Confidential Information; or

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.1.3 when the last Confidential information received is no longer confidential without breach of this Agreement or other breach of law.
texts.text: 5.1.3 when the last Confidential information received is no longer confidential without breach of this Agreement or other breach of law.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5.2 Termination of this Agreement shall be without prejudice to the provisions of Clauses 3.1 and 3.2 and Clause 7, all of which provisions shall survive any termination of this Agreement.
texts.text: 5.2 Termination of this Agreement shall be without prejudice to the provisions of Clauses 3.1 and 3.2 and Clause 7, all of which provisions shall survive any termination of this Agreement.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6 WAIVER
texts.text: 6 WAIVER

texts.label: text
texts.orig: No failure or delay by any Party in exercising any right under this Agreement shall operate as a waiver thereof, and no waiver or variation of any term of this Agreement shall be valid unless it is in writing and signed by the Party by whom it is given.
texts.text: No failure or delay by any Party in exercising any right under this Agreement shall operate as a waiver thereof, and no waiver or variation of any term of this Agreement shall be valid unless it is in writing and signed by the Party by whom it is given.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7 NOT USED

texts.label: page_header
texts.orig: 8 STATUS
texts.text: 8 STATUS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8.1 For the avoidance of doubt neither the Disclosing Party nor the Receiving Party shall be under any obligation or commitment to enter into discussions or any further agreement with regard to the Permitted Purpose merely by reason of execution of this Agreement or the disclosure or evaluation of Disclosed Information. This Agreement shall not constitute nor shall be construed as constituting an offer or commitment to enter into such discussion or further agreement.
texts.text: 8.1 For the avoidance of doubt neither the Disclosing Party nor the Receiving Party shall be under any obligation or commitment to enter into discussions or any further agreement with regard to the Permitted Purpose merely by reason of execution of this Agreement or the disclosure or evaluation of Disclosed Information. This Agreement shall not constitute nor shall be construed as constituting an offer or commitment to enter into such discussion or further agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 8.2 The Receiving Party acknowledges that the Disclosed Information is provided on a non-exclusive basis.
texts.text: 8.2 The Receiving Party acknowledges that the Disclosed Information is provided on a non-exclusive basis.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 9 MISCELLANEOUS
texts.text: 9 MISCELLANEOUS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9.1 This Agreement may be executed in counterparts with the same effect as if the signatures to each such counterpart were on the same document provided that this Agreement shall not be effective until a counterpart has been executed and delivered by each Party. A Party shall be entitled to rely on a copy of this Agreement signed by the other Party and delivered to it by facsimile transmission or electronic means (including e-mail) until the delivery to it of an original of this Agreement containing the original signature of the other Party.
texts.text: 9.1 This Agreement may be executed in counterparts with the same effect as if the signatures to each such counterpart were on the same document provided that this Agreement shall not be effective until a counterpart has been executed and delivered by each Party. A Party shall be entitled to rely on a copy of this Agreement signed by the other Party and delivered to it by facsimile transmission or electronic means (including e-mail) until the delivery to it of an original of this Agreement containing the original signature of the other Party.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9.2 All notices which are required to be given hereunder shall be in writing and shall be sent by registered post or courier, or by email to the address set out in clause 9.3 of this Agreement or otherwise notified by either Party to the other from time to time.
texts.text: 9.2 All notices which are required to be given hereunder shall be in writing and shall be sent by registered post or courier, or by email to the address set out in clause 9.3 of this Agreement or otherwise notified by either Party to the other from time to time.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 9.3 Any such notice may be delivered by hand or sent by registered post or courier, or email and shall be deemed to have been served if by hand when delivered, if by first class post forty-eight (48) hours after posting and if by email at the time of completion of transmission by the sender.
texts.text: 9.3 Any such notice may be delivered by hand or sent by registered post or courier, or email and shall be deemed to have been served if by hand when delivered, if by first class post forty-eight (48) hours after posting and if by email at the time of completion of transmission by the sender.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Parties confirm that no term of this Agreement is enforceable under the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999 by a person who is not a party to this Agreement but this does not affect any right or remedy of a third party which exists or is available apart from that Act.
